positive: A highly stylized, intricate, and symmetrical illustration of a mythical forest spirit or guardian. The subject should be centered, embodying graceful strength, and surrounded by stylized flora like glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, curled vine patterns, and elegant, abstract foliage. Use a color palette dominated by deep teal, emerald green, sapphire blue, and accents of luminous gold and soft lavender. The style must be highly detailed, suitable for tattoo flash or apparel print, resembling Art Nouveau mixed with Japanese Ukiyo-e graphic elements. Focus on clean silhouettes, strong contrast between shadowed areas and luminous accents, and complex negative space utilization. Intricate linework, vector art quality, flat design influence, perfect for screen printing or textile direct-to-garment transfer. Minimalism in composition, maximalism in detail.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, cropped, amateur, extra limbs, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, distracting elements
